log.context:
Replied to relarey with the cost estimate. Key findings:

- Only **167 transcripts** were ingested (not 10K) — the Bokoen1 channel has 167 HoI4 videos
- Total text: **1.4MB** (~360K tokens)
- Ingestion status: **done** (completed 2026-03-30)
- Estimated total cost: **$0.50 - $1.50**, dominated by GPT-4o-mini entity extraction calls. Embeddings were negligible (~$0.01).
